howItWorks.intro: This boat fuel burn rate calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Fuel Burn
rules.explanation: Horsepower times specific fuel consumption rate.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: How much fuel does a boat use?
faq.a: A rough rule: gas engines burn 0.075 GPH per HP at full throttle, diesel 0.055.
Run at 70-75% throttle for best efficiency. Trim properly and keep hull clean.
